tasks.label: rename-test-files
tasks.command: bash /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow/do-renames.sh

tasks.label: cleanup-temp-files
tasks.command: rm -f /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow/run-test.js /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow/run-test-save.js /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow/do-renames.sh && echo 'CLEANUP_DONE'

tasks.label: test-org-verify
tasks.command: node --test --test-force-exit tests/test-organization.test.js 2>&1; echo EXIT=$?

tasks.label: test-org-run
tasks.command: export PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/bin:$PATH && node --test --test-force-exit tests/test-organization.test.js 2>&1; echo EXIT=$?

tasks.label: test-org-nvm
tasks.command: source ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; which node; node --test --test-force-exit tests/test-organization.test.js 2>&1; echo EXIT=$?

tasks.label: full-test-suite
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; npm test 2>&1 | tail -10

tasks.label: full-test-results
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; npm test 2>&1 | grep -E '^# (tests|pass|fail)'

tasks.label: lint-check
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; npx eslint tests/test-organization.test.js 2>&1; echo LINT_EXIT=$?

tasks.label: run-recurrence-tests
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && node --test --test-force-exit tests/recurrence-safety.test.js > /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow/test-rec-out.txt 2>&1; echo "DONE_EXIT=$?"

tasks.label: run-recurrence-tests-green
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && node --test --test-force-exit tests/recurrence-safety.test.js > /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow/test-rec-out.txt 2>&1; echo "DONE_EXIT=$?"

tasks.label: full-test-v0715
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && npm test > /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow/test-full-v0715.txt 2>&1; echo "FULL_TEST_EXIT=$?"

tasks.label: lint-recurrence
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && npx eslint tests/recurrence-safety.test.js src/services/recurring.service.js 2>&1; echo "LINT_EXIT=$?"

tasks.label: run-task-boundaries
tasks.command: cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && node --test --test-force-exit tests/task-boundaries.test.js 2>&1 | grep -E '(^ok |^not ok |# tests|# pass|# fail)'; echo 'TASK_DONE'

tasks.label: run-task-boundaries-nvm
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && node --test --test-force-exit tests/task-boundaries.test.js 2>&1 | grep -E '(^ok |^not ok |# tests|# pass|# fail)'; echo 'TASK_DONE'

tasks.label: full-suite-v0726
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && npm test 2>&1 | grep -E '^# (tests|pass|fail)'; echo 'FULL_SUITE_DONE'

tasks.label: run-api-contracts-test
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && node --test --test-force-exit tests/api-contracts.test.js 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys; lines=sys.stdin.readlines(); nok=[l.rstrip() for l in lines if l.strip().startswith('not ok') and 'subtestsFailed' not in l]; print('FAILURES:', len(nok)); [print(l.strip()[:140]) for l in nok]; [print(l.strip()) for l in lines if l.strip().startswith('# tests') or l.strip().startswith('# pass') or l.strip().startswith('# fail')]; print('PARSE_DONE')"

tasks.label: run-api-contracts-debug
tasks.command: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh 2>/dev/null; cd /home/shyam/personal/lifeflow && node --test --test-force-exit tests/api-contracts.test.js 2>&1 | grep -B1 -A20 'not ok 1 - POST' | head -30
